title: Roguelike Creations
description:
Experience Multiplayer Modded Minecraft with the Create Mod at the center, and lots of new weapons, challenges and exploration.  Official server included!
- AUG 22 25'; The server for this modpack has been shut down due to lack of usage. Contact us
body:
## A Balance Between Vanilla and Mods
Including Create, Botania, Farmers Delight and the RPG series at the spotlight, this pack aims to create an experience that expands on vanilla concepts with ample room to solve some of Vanilla's most tragic fallbacks. "One block at a time?" Nonsense, but just not too many blocks at a time- 

### The World, Changed: 
- Mobs move faster and are generally harder but offer better loot
- Difficulty scales based on location
- Combat is overhauled
- Nights and days are longer (WIP)
- Dungeons are deeper and less forgiving, but offer more and better loot 
- Biomes are larger
- Villages are finely tuned and overhauled 

### Mods to Note: 
- Botania, for magic automation meant to synergize with all other mods
- AE2, a fairly endgame solution to storage
- Farmers delight, with a slew of companion addons as well as cooking for blockheads for the kitchen
- The RPG series, offering new weapons, spells and rare and powerful jewlery
- Zenith (Apotheosis) for extreme armor and enchanting customization
- All the important 

## Your Experience
Players are encouraged to build diverse farms, sprawling beautiful rail networks and unique contraptions to create their ideal. There are no tech mods other than AE2 that would clash with create, but plenty of unique ways to generate the power for AE2. Ores cannot be sifted from sand and gravel. Accurate and cheap teleportation is not possible. Its all about problem solving and creating solutions with your peers. 

## Our Server, For You
This pack offers a dedicated server, automatically added to the multiplayer menu that the owner, TriageONE hosts. This server should stay up and be up until otherwise noted. You are free to join us at any time, and the owners of this pack play regularily. If you do, feel free to join our discord server as well. This server is supposed to be friendly and cooperative; Respect others and their belongings, land and builds. Otherwise, we believe the server should embrace your 

Is the server missing from your list? Try `triagecore.com`
